author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Four changes. (1) Write 00-foundations/03-the-language-landscape.md - conceptual guide to programming languages, no syntax, covers systems/application/specialized languages, the 'it depends' principle, why the guild uses Rust. (2) Renumber and update 00-foundations/04-your-workspace.md (was 03) to include Rust toolchain setup. Renumber git chapter to 05. (3) Update 02-the-methodology/02-tracking-your-work.md to make the issue tracker a Rust CLI project instead of HTML/JS, note the bookmark manager was the one HTML/JS exception. (4) Rewrite README.md to reflect the full 4-phase apprentice path including Phase 3 placeholders.
